hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null && if [ -f scripts/memory_aging.py ]; then STALE=$(python scripts/memory_aging.py stale --days 7 --json 2>/dev/null | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"stale_count\",0))" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$STALE" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo "[MAVEN STALENESS REPORT] $STALE memory entries are >7d old. Run: python scripts/memory_aging.py stale --days 7"; fi; fi; if [ -f scripts/agent_inbox.py ]; then echo "[MAVEN INBOX] Check: python scripts/agent_inbox.py list --to maven"; fi'
